description:
GIVEN a user is an audio only subscriber
AND the game level blackedOutVideo equals false in MAST EPGv3
AND the game level entitledAudio equals true in MAST EPGv3
AND the game level entitledVideo equals false in MAST EPGv3

steps.action:
WHEN a user selects an out-of-market scheduled/in-progress game tile
OR a user selects an archive game tile
steps.result:
THEN a lock icon displays on both feed buttons in the Feed Select modal
AND the user is navigated to the Subscriptions/Paywall page if they select one of the feed buttons
AND the user is navigated back to the selected game tile after pressing the CIRCLE button on the controller
